tests.test_name: All download formats produce valid output
tests.journey: A user with a completed BDD Product Owner analysis downloads results in Markdown, HTML, and JSON formats and verifies each file is structurally valid.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: All download formats produce valid output
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A completed BDD Product Owner analysis exists
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks Download Markdown, then Download HTML, then Download JSON
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Each format produces a correctly typed file with expected structural markers: '##' in Markdown, '<html lang=' and '</html>' in HTML, framework 'bdd' metadata and at least one test in JSON

tests.test_name: JSON download contains add-on sections when add-ons were selected
tests.journey: A user who ran a BDD Product Owner analysis with Gap Analysis enabled downloads the JSON output and verifies the add-on section is present at the top level.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: JSON download contains add-on sections when add-ons were selected
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A completed BDD Product Owner analysis with Gap Analysis add-on selected
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The downloaded JSON file contains a top-level key 'gap_analysis'
